items.title: Conway and Tickner return to New Zealand central contracts list
items.summary: Adi Ashok and Muhammad Abbas have been dropped from the list, while Kane Williamson has retired after a year on a casual contract

items.title: Erling Haaland bows down to ‘madman’ Lionel Messi after record-breaking World Cup hat-trick
items.summary: Erling Haaland tipped his hat to Lionel Messi following the Argentine superstar's hat-trick against Algeria.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
